content: Q145 Proprioception: muscle spindles (length+rate), Golgi tendon organs (tension), joint receptors; dorsal column-medial lemniscal pathway to cortex; spinocerebellar tracts to cerebellum; cerebellum holds forward body model and corrects prediction errors; Ian Waterman case — complete loss from viral illness, required visual feedback to stand
